actionCalls.description: Calls an action that converts the end date of the current item in the loop to a date and time format.
actionCalls.name: ConvertEndDateToDateTime
actionCalls.label: Convert End Date to Date Time

actionCalls.description: Calls an action that converts the start date of the current item in the loop to a date and time format.
actionCalls.name: ConvertStartDateToDateTime
actionCalls.label: Convert Start Date to Date Time

actionCalls.description: Calls an action that converts the end date time of the current item in the loop to a date string format.
actionCalls.name: GetEndDate
actionCalls.label: Get End Date

actionCalls.description: Calls an action that converts the prior end date time of the current item in the loop to a date string format.
actionCalls.name: GetPriorEndDate
actionCalls.label: Get Prior End Date

actionCalls.description: Calls an action that converts the prior start date time of the current item in the loop to a date string format.
actionCalls.name: GetPriorStartDate
actionCalls.label: Get Prior Start Date

actionCalls.description: Calls an action that converts the start date time of the current item in the loop to a date string format.
actionCalls.name: GetStartDate
actionCalls.label: Get Start Date

assignments.description: Adds the NextDate value to the DateRange collection.
assignments.name: AddNextDateToDateRange
assignments.label: Add Next Date to Date Range

assignments.description: Adds the StartDateFormula date to the DateRange collection.
assignments.name: AddStartDateToCollection
assignments.label: Add Start Date to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the TimeSheetEntry record variable to the TimeSheetEntries record collection variable.
assignments.name: AddTimeSheetEntryToCollection
assignments.label: Add Time Sheet Entry to Collection

assignments.description: Adds the time sheet ID of the current record in the loop to the TimeSheetIds collection.
assignments.name: AddTimeSheetIdToCollection
assignments.label: Add Time Sheet ID To Collection

assignments.description: Adds the TimeSheet record variable to the NewTimeSheets record collection variable.
assignments.name: AddTimeSheetToCollection
assignments.label: Add Time Sheet to Collection

assignments.description: Sets the NextDate variable to the value in AddOneDayFormula.
assignments.name: SetNextDateVariable
assignments.label: Set Next Date Variable

assignments.description: Sets the TimeSheetEntryEndTime variable to the End Time of the triggering record.
assignments.name: SetTimeSheetEntryEndTime
assignments.label: Set Time Sheet Entry End Time

assignments.description: Sets the TimeSheetEntryStartTime variable to the start time of the triggering record and TimeSheetEntryEndTime variable to the end time of the triggering record.
assignments.name: SetTimeSheetEntryStartTimeAndEndTime
assignments.label: Set Time Sheet Entry Start Time and End Time

assignments.description: Sets the TimeSheetEntryStartTime variable to the start time of the triggering record.
assignments.name: SetTimeSheetEntryStartTimeVariable
assignments.label: Set Time Sheet Entry Start Time Variable

assignments.description: Sets the TimeSheetId variable to the time sheet ID of the current item in the loop, the TimeSheetEntryStartDateTime variable to the Output from Convert Start Date to Date and Time, and the TimeSheetEntryEndDateTime variable to the Output from Convert End Date to Date and Time
assignments.name: SetTimeSheetEntryVariables
assignments.label: Set Time Sheet Entry Variables

assignments.description: Sets field values for the TimeSheetEntry record variable, setting the time sheet ID to the TimeSheetId variable value, the start time to the TimeSheetEntryStartTime value, the end time to the TimeSheetEntryEndTime value, and the category to Vacation.
assignments.name: SetTimeSheetEntryVariableValues
assignments.label: Set Time Sheet Entry Variable Values

assignments.description: Assigns field values for the TimeSheet record variable, setting the start and and date to match the values of the current item in the loop, and the resource ID to that of the triggering record.
assignments.name: SetTimeSheetVariableValues
assignments.label: Set Time Sheet Variable Values

collectionProcessors.description: Filters records from Time Sheets from Get Time record collection variable with start and end dates matching that of the current item in the loop. Stores the results in the Time Sheets from Filter Time Sheets record collection variable.
collectionProcessors.name: FilterTimeSheets
collectionProcessors.label: Filter Time Sheets

decisions.description: Determines whether time sheet records were found by checking if the Time Sheets from Get All Time Sheets record collection variable contains records.
decisions.name: HaveAllTimeSheets
decisions.label: Have All Time Sheets?

decisions.description: Determines whether the NewTimeSheetEntries record collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveNewTimeSheetEntries
decisions.label: Have New Time Sheet Entries?

decisions.description: Determines whether the NewTimeSheets record collection variable contains records.
decisions.name: HaveNewTimeSheets
decisions.label: Have New Time Sheets?

decisions.description: Determines whether time sheet records were found by checking if the Time Sheets from Filter Time Sheets record collection variable contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveTimeSheet
decisions.label: Have Time Sheet?

decisions.description: Determines whether time sheet entry records were found by checking if the Time Sheet Entries from Get Time Sheet Entries record collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveTimeSheetEntries
decisions.label: Have Time Sheet Entries?

decisions.description: Determines whether time sheet records were found by checking if the Time Sheets from Get Time Sheets record collection contains a record.
decisions.name: HaveTimeSheets
decisions.label: Have Time Sheets?

decisions.description: Determines whether NextDate value is greater than the value in EndDateFormula.
decisions.name: IsNextDateAfterEndDate
decisions.label: Is Next Date After End Date?

decisions.description: Determines whether the resource absence is approved by checking whether the status of the triggering record is changed and approved.
decisions.name: IsResourceAbsenceApproved
decisions.label: Is Resource Absence Approved?

decisions.description: Determines if the start date, end date, or both start and end dates of the current item in the loop match that of the triggering record.
decisions.name: WhichTimeSheetDatesMatch
decisions.label: Which Time Sheet Dates Match?

formulas.description: Calculates the next date by adding one day to the current date of the triggering record.
formulas.name: AddOneDayFormula

formulas.description: Converts the end date string output by the action into a date format.
formulas.name: EndDateFormula

formulas.description: Converts the prior end date string output by the action into a date format.
formulas.name: PriorEndDateFormula

formulas.description: Converts the prior start date string output by the action into a date format.
formulas.name: PriorStartDateFormula

formulas.description: Converts the start date string output by the action into a date format.
formulas.name: StartDateFormula

loops.description: Repeats actions for each record in the Time Sheets from Get All Time Sheets record collection variable.
loops.name: IterateOverAllTimeSheets
loops.label: Iterate Over All Time Sheets

loops.description: Repeats actions for the items in the DateRange collection.
loops.name: IterateOverDateRange
loops.label: Iterate Over Date Range

loops.description: Repeats an action for each item in the DateRange collection.
loops.name: IterateOverDateRange2
loops.label: Iterate Over Date Range

loops.description: Repeats an action for each record in the Time Sheets from Get Time Sheets collection.
loops.name: IterateOverTimeSheets
loops.label: Iterate Over Time Sheets

recordCreates.description: Creates records using the NewTimeSheets record collection variable.
recordCreates.name: CreateTimeSheets
recordCreates.label: Create Time Sheets

recordDeletes.description: Deletes the Time Sheet Entry records in the Time Sheet Entries from Get Time Sheet Entries record collection.
recordDeletes.name: DeleteTimeSheetEntries
recordDeletes.label: Delete Time Sheet Entries

recordLookups.description: Gets time sheet records with a start date on or after the StartDateFormula date, an end date on or before EndDateFormula date, and service resource ID matching that of the triggering record. Stores the results in Time Sheets from Get All Time Sheets record collection variable.
recordLookups.name: GetAllTimeSheets
recordLookups.label: Get All Time Sheets

recordLookups.description: Gets time sheet entry records with a start time that’s on or after the previous start time of the triggering record, an end time that’s on or before the previous end time of the triggering record, a time sheet ID in the TimeSheetIds collection, and a category of Vacation or UnpaidVacation. Stores the results in Time Sheet Entries from Get Time Sheet Entries collection.
recordLookups.name: GetTimeSheetEntries
recordLookups.label: Get Time Sheet Entries

recordLookups.description: Gets time sheet records with a start date on or after the PriorStartDateFormula date, an end date on or before the PriorEndDateFormula date, and a service resource ID matching the resource ID of the triggering record. Stores the results in Time Sheets from Get Time Sheets record collection variable.
recordLookups.name: GetTimeSheets
recordLookups.label: Get Time Sheets

start.filterFormula: OR( AND(ISCHANGED({!$Record.ApprovalStatus}), ISPICKVAL({!$Record.ApprovalStatus}, "Approved")), AND(ISPICKVAL({!$Record.ApprovalStatus}, "Approved"), OR(ISCHANGED({!$Record.Type}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.Start}), ISCHANGED({!$Record.End}))), AND(ISCHANGED({!$Record.ApprovalStatus}),PRIORVALUE({!$Record.ApprovalStatus}) = "Approved") )

variables.description: Stores all the dates from start to end date.
variables.name: DateRange

variables.description: Stores a collection of time sheet entry records to be created.
variables.name: NewTimeSheetEntries

variables.description: Stores a collection of time sheet records to be created.
variables.name: NewTimeSheets

variables.description: Stores the date after the current date.
variables.name: NextDate

variables.description: Stores a time sheet record to be created.
variables.name: TimeSheet

variables.description: Stores a time sheet entry record to be created.
variables.name: TimeSheetEntry

variables.description: Stores the output from the Convert End Date to Date and Time element.
variables.name: TimeSheetEntryEndDateTime

variables.description: Stores the output from the Convert Start Date to Date and Time element.
variables.name: TimeSheetEntryStartDateTime

variables.description: Stores the ID of a time sheet record.
variables.name: TimeSheetId

variables.description: Stores a collection of time sheet IDs.
variables.name: TimeSheetIds
